g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate.
g.text: mdd toolchain (utility, outside the parity gate)

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Guide
g.text: PLAN then EXECUTE an Azure Container
runbook, then run it to live traffic

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Dialect
g.text: artifact is written — no silent default

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Purpose
mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..AccessCheck
g.text: Account for who READS and WRITES

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Execute
g.text: autonomous except irreversible steps; halt on error

g.data-qualified-name: mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..GoLive
mdd toolchain .utility. outside the parity gate..Inspect

g.text: v1 supports only azure-container-apps. Reads MDD models
+ the target repo read-only to PLAN, then EXECUTES the
runbook to live traffic. PAUSES with a BLOCKING
clarification on ambiguity OR a GENERALIZED go-live
az / terraform / docker via Bash; the old "executes
the dialect is explicitly confirmed. One per run
(Bicep XOR Terraform). FULL PARITY; no silent default.
generated until dev/staging/prod is confirmed. No
store must have a named READER and WRITER, each with
an admitted network path. A read-but-never-written
store, or a writer with no admitted path, is SURFACED
as a blocking question. Constrained by
itself — manage auth, dry-run before any apply, run
idempotent steps AUTONOMOUSLY, BLOCK only at irreversible
steps. HALT on first error; new revision at 0% traffic
Mandatory «include» of Execute: the ONE stop full-auto
never skips. Surfaces the full production billing
multi-factor gate state, then BLOCKS for explicit
operator confirmation before the live-traffic cutover.
